about.title: About
about.body: Studio-led interior architecture and remodeling design with a strong focus on livable elegance and practical detail.

services.title: Services
services.body: Full interior design, kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, and complete house transformation support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For project inquiries, use the contacts below or reach out through social channels.
